name: The Credit People
description_short: Affordable credit repair with a unique flat-rate 6-month option at $419, offering significant savings over monthly billing. Low $19 setup fee makes getting started easy.
description_long:
The Credit People is a credit repair company based in Sandy, Utah, that has been in operation since 2001. The company has carved out a niche in the market by offering one of the most flexible billing structures in the credit repair industry: clients can choose between a standard $79 per month plan or a flat-rate $419 package that covers a full six months of service. The 6-month option effectively reduces the monthly cost to about $70 and provides predictable, capped spending — a meaningful advantage for consumers who are already managing tight budgets while dealing with credit problems.

The company's $19 setup fee is the lowest in the industry, removing one of the biggest barriers to entry that keeps people from starting credit repair. Once enrolled, The Credit People work with all three major credit bureaus to identify and dispute inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items. Their process includes credit report analysis, dispute letter preparation and submission, creditor interventions, and ongoing score monitoring. Clients can track their progress through an online portal that shows which items have been disputed, which have been removed, and how their scores are trending.

The Credit People offer a conditional money-back guarantee, which requires that the client follow the program's guidelines and allow sufficient time for disputes to process. While this is not as straightforward as the unconditional guarantees offered by some competitors, it does provide a layer of protection for consumers who are concerned about paying for a service that might not deliver results. The company has maintained a B+ BBB rating — solid, though not at the A+ level achieved by several competitors.

For consumers who know they will need several months of credit repair work and want to lock in a predictable cost, The Credit People's 6-month flat-rate plan is genuinely hard to beat on value. The low setup fee and competitive monthly rate make it accessible even for people with limited disposable income. The main limitations are a less polished client experience compared to premium providers and the slightly lower BBB rating. If you are looking for the most cost-effective path to professional credit repair and do not need bells and whistles like credit monitoring or identity theft protection, The Credit People deserve serious consideration.

pricing.guarantee_details: Conditional money-back guarantee. Clients must follow program guidelines and allow adequate time for dispute processing. Refund eligibility is assessed on a case-by-case basis.

pros: Flat-rate 6-month plan at $419 offers the best long-term value in the industry
Lowest setup fee at just $19 makes starting credit repair highly accessible
Competitive monthly rate of $79 even without the 6-month commitment
Works with all three credit bureaus simultaneously
Conditional money-back guarantee provides some consumer protection
Free initial credit consultation with score analysis
cons: B+ BBB rating is lower than top competitors like The Credit Pros and Credit Saint
Conditional money-back guarantee is less straightforward than unconditional offers
No credit monitoring or identity theft protection included
Client portal and overall experience is less polished than premium competitors
best_for: Consumers who want a flat-rate option to cap their total credit repair spending
Budget-conscious individuals looking for the lowest possible setup fee
People who expect to need 4-6 months of credit repair work
Anyone who prefers predictable costs over month-to-month billing uncertainty
diagnosis: Best for consumers who want a flat-rate 6-month option. The $419/6-month plan offers significant savings. Watch out for: B+ BBB rating is lower than top competitors.
services: Disputes with all three credit bureaus
Cease and desist letters to debt collectors
Online portal with dispute status updates
Credit education and score improvement tips
typical_results_timeline: Most clients see initial dispute results within 30-45 days. The 6-month flat-rate plan provides enough runway for 4-5 complete dispute cycles, which is typically sufficient to address most negative items.
